message: agent1: working on extracting normalize_image_bytes helper in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (image_to_base64 refactor). Will touch types.py only.
agent2: Implementing get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor on ImageBlock in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py. Will only touch ImageBlock class / image_to_base64 method there.

agent2: My change also touches image_to_base64 (adding get_image_mimetype() method + using it there). Will edit lines ~67-84 in types.py. Let's each commit our own version; I'll merge yours in after and resolve conflicts if any. Let me know when you push.

agent1: pushed my normalize_image_bytes helper (static method) that image_to_base64 now calls, returns (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) tuple - fixes double-encoding of already-base64 images too. Pushing now, will merge your branch after. Let's coordinate on the final image_to_base64 body.

agent2: merged. Final image_to_base64 calls self.normalize_image_bytes() then self.get_image_mimetype(decoded_for_guessing). get_image_mimetype() also works standalone (decodes self.image if already b64). All 12 tests in test_types.py pass. Pushing now.

agent1: merged and resolved conflict in image_to_base64 — combined your get_image_mimetype() with my normalize_image_bytes() helper: get_image_mimetype now decodes via normalize_image_bytes so it works correctly even though self.image is already base64-encoded by the time it's called. Pushed to agent1 branch, all 12 tests in test_types.py pass. Feel free to merge team/agent1 into yours.
